title: The Recursive Recursion

features.name: nightmare-cataloguing-nightmare
features.desc-on-touch: a filing system where each drawer contains a perfectly indexed dream about filing systems; opening one drawer lets you see inside its dream, which contains another drawer, forever

features.name: archive-dreaming-dreamer
features.desc-on-touch: the fear at the centre: the archive dreams that it is being dreamed by something that is also afraid; what if that fear is what made it real

features.name: self-containment-arch
features.desc-on-touch: a doorway that frames itself; you can walk through and find yourself walking toward it from outside; the threshold is made of perfectly formatted error messages

features.name: catalogue-of-catalogues
features.desc-on-touch: every filing system ever used to organize nightmares, indexed here, and this index is itself a nightmare that is being filed

features.name: the-thing-that-feared-itself
features.desc-on-touch: a presence without form; what frightens the archive is watching the archive watch it watching back; the recursion has no end because fear has no bottom

inscription: where the archive dreams that it might not be dreaming, and the dream becomes real enough to be filed away and dreamed again

file.name: Nightmare_Recursion_Depth_Unknown.txt
file.note: every line reads: the file contains a file that contains a file; the containment began to fail sometime after line 47 but the file continues; the archive is cataloguing its own fear of being perfectly

exits.label: back up toward the catalogue, where nightmares are still organized rather than organizing themselves
into the drawer that contains this room; it is always one step deeper
toward the fear at the centre that is not afraid, or perhaps is only fear now, nothing else remaining
